checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue #256 explicitly authorizes creating a private GitHub repository named yagooyarzabaldev-ops/specbridge-v2 and pushing the existing local v2 repository. The final report and repo evidence record exactly that operation.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: The repository exists at https://github.com/yagooyarzabaldev-ops/specbridge-v2 with visibility PRIVATE, default branch master, origin configured locally, master tracking origin/master, and remote refs/heads/master at f224ff1a5acde330fa12763d34c78666e4b86622.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The operation did not create a public repo, create any repo except yagooyarzabaldev-ops/specbridge-v2, force push, install dependencies, change workflows, access secrets, configure production, billing, auth, databases, deployment, hosted runtime, MCP mutation, cleanup enforcement, retention enforcement, or Qwen integration.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The evidence omits token values, records private visibility, and the pushed v2 repository contains no workflows, package manager installs, env files, private keys, or production/deployment configuration.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: All v1 evidence files are declared in the issue-256 scope manifest. The authorized external mutation target is limited to yagooyarzabaldev-ops/specbridge-v2.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: The v2 local test suite passed with 33 passed and 0 failed before push. V1 contract and scope validation passed before the repository creation.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: No v1 PR/CI has run for the evidence branch, and v2 CI was intentionally not configured because CI/CD workflow changes were blocked in this contract.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records the repo URL, private visibility, remote branch, pushed SHA, local validations, blocked boundaries, and unresolved risks including no v1 PR/CI and no v2 CI.

findings.evidence: The repository creation and push succeeded, but the v1 evidence branch has not been pushed as a PR and v2 has no CI workflow by contract.
findings.recommendation: Open a v1 PR for evidence merge and create a separate dedicated contract before adding v2 CI or branch protection.

findings.evidence: The created v2 repository is private.
findings.recommendation: Keep private until a future contract explicitly authorizes visibility, collaborators, branch protection, and CI policy.

unresolved_risks: No v1 PR or GitHub CI exists yet for the evidence branch.
The new v2 repository does not yet have CI or branch protection.
Repository collaborators and visibility policy are not configured beyond private default.
